title: desmodium caffrum
intro: Desmodium caffrum, also known as Caffrum tick clover, is a perennial herb in the legume family native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Desmodium caffrum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in herbal remedies, capsules, and topical applications.
